epigraph.quote: I am wearing a sweater, an arran cardigan, a sheepskin waistcoat & a jacket & my hands are nearly too cold to write.

moments.quote: There is a dog walk, lovely views, old Georgian house & HEATED toilets.
High Force, the highest waterfall in Britain, only had water in this ↓ channel.

images.caption: High Force, the highest waterfall in Britain

moments.quote: We drove on to Haltwhistle, had lunch & met Peter (from Newcastle Uni) off the train.
leather shoes with delicate cut-out leather uppers, coins, hair combs & a horse's leather helmet.
a very pretty field next to the R. Tyne, lots of rabbit holes for Tonic to search in.

images.caption: The latrines at Housesteads, as they were

moments.quote: We went to Housesteads, I remembered the loos.
On to Chesters, where there is a Roman Bridge abuttment.
It was much warmer in town + more comfortable + Peter has central heating.
We left at 2pm & stopped in York for a cracked light.
